column1: # ESP-IDF Partition Table — dual-OTA layout (16 MB flash)
# ota_0 stays at 0x10000 so build-dist.sh's flash_files["0x10000"] app capture keeps working
# and claudeq-app.bin is exactly the OTA image. ota_0/ota_1 are 4 MB each (app ~1.5 MB → headroom);
# empty otadata boots ota_0 on a fresh full flash. Changing this table needs a one-time cable/web reflash.
